summary: Loose start builds into a wicked jam; recording quality unclear but the performance is recommended
review: The reviewer notes that the set begins loosely and even sounds disintegrated at first, but it quickly evolves into an exciting jam with tasteful electronic modulation. While no specific details about the source or sound clarity are given, the overall impression of the show is very positive.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the musical flow despite no technical details; rating reflects strong show quality with unknown recording fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard or audience source; reviewer did not mention clarity issues, implying an acceptable listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Starts loose and disintegrated but builds into a compelling jam with effective electronic effects.
